response.justification: While the candidate has extensive general software development experience, strong communication skills, and proficiency in CI/CD, they critically lack the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience on a Windows platform. Furthermore, there is no explicit domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income, which are core requirements for this role. These significant gaps make the candidate unsuitable for an interview at this time.
strengths: Extensive general software development experience (10+ years).
Demonstrated strong communication skills through workshops and talks.
Proficiency in CI/CD practices and some desirable languages like Java.
concerns: Lack of mandatory 5-10 years of strong C++ development experience on Windows.
Absence of specific domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income.
Limited explicit experience with SQL Server/Oracle databases, only general SQL/MySQL.
